cells.gap-junction: Gap junction (connexon) channels connecting adjacent cells for direct cytoplasmic communication
cells.langhans-giant-cell: Langhans giant cell with horseshoe-arranged nuclei at the periphery — seen in granulomatous inflammation
cells.leydig-cell: Testis cross-section — seminiferous tubules surrounded by interstitial Leydig cells (Gray's anatomy)
cells.mast-cell: Mast cell with granules containing histamine and heparin — key effector in type I hypersensitivity
cells.melanocyte: Melanocyte dendritic processes transferring melanin to surrounding keratinocytes
cells.memory-t-lymphocyte: Immunological memory: long-lived memory B and T lymphocytes enable rapid secondary responses on re-exposure
cells.naive-b-lymphocyte: B lymphocyte with surface immunoglobulin (BCR) — naïve B cells express IgM and IgD awaiting first antigen encounter
cells.ovarian-theca-cell: Ovarian follicle histology showing granulosa and theca cell layers surrounding the oocyte
cells.oxidative-phosphorylation: Inner mitochondrial membrane respiratory chain: complexes I–IV pass electrons to O₂; proton pumping drives ATP synthase (Complex V)
cells.th1: CD4⁺ T-helper subset differentiation — IL-12/IFN-γ drives Th1 macrophage-activating immunity
cells.th17: CD4⁺ T-helper subset differentiation pathways — IL-23 sustains Th17 lineage

musculoskeletal.sarcomere: Sarcomere bands: Z line (boundaries), M line (center), A band (myosin length), I band (actin only), H zone (thick filaments only)

symptoms.acanthosis-nigricans: Velvety hyperpigmented plaques in the axilla — cutaneous marker of insulin resistance
symptoms.allodynia: Pain from normally nonpainful light touch — classic in postherpetic neuralgia
symptoms.amnesia: Hippocampus, amygdala, and prefrontal cortex — medial temporal lobe structures essential for declarative memory consolidation
symptoms.androgenic-alopecia: Ludwig classification of female pattern hair loss — progressive crown thinning grades I–III
symptoms.anosmia: Olfactory nerve (CN I) — fila pass through cribriform plate to olfactory bulb
symptoms.anxiety: Generalized anxiety — persistent excessive worry with somatic symptoms
symptoms.autonomic-symptoms: Horner syndrome diagram — sympathetic and parasympathetic innervation of the eye illustrating cranial autonomic symptoms
symptoms.brain-fog: Hypothyroid myxedema — metabolic endocrine cause of slowed mentation and subjective cognitive clouding
symptoms.brudzinski-sign: Brudziński sign — passive neck flexion causes involuntary hip/knee flexion in meningitis
symptoms.calcinosis: Calcinosis cutis — subcutaneous calcium deposits in systemic sclerosis
symptoms.cannon-a-waves: Elevated jugular venous pressure — prominent neck vein pulsations seen with AV dissociation and cannon A waves
symptoms.central-adiposity: Waist-to-hip ratio silhouettes — apple (central) vs pear (gynoid) body fat distribution
symptoms.central-nervous-system-depression: Glasgow Coma Scale — eye, verbal, and motor scoring to quantify depressed level of consciousness
symptoms.cheyne-stokes-respiration: Cheyne-Stokes respiration — cyclic crescendo-decrescendo breathing with central apneic pauses
symptoms.clonic-phase: Clonic phase of generalized seizure — rhythmic convulsive jerking after tonic stiffening
symptoms.clubbing: Finger clubbing — increased convexity of nail bed with loss of Lovibond angle
symptoms.confusion: Delirium tremens — severe alcohol withdrawal with acute confusion, autonomic hyperactivity, and tremor
symptoms.cyanosis: Peripheral cyanosis of the lower extremity due to ischemia
symptoms.dactylitis: Painful swelling of the hands — dactylitis in sickle cell disease
symptoms.decerebrate-posturing: Decerebrate posture — bilateral arm and leg extension; brainstem injury at or below red nucleus
symptoms.decorticate-posturing: Decorticate posture — arms flexed toward core, legs extended; lesion above red nucleus
symptoms.dysesthesia: Unpleasant burning or abnormal sensation — neuropathic symptom in peripheral neuropathy
symptoms.ecchymosis: Periorbital ecchymosis — non-blanching blood extravasation into skin
symptoms.enuresis: Nocturnal enuresis — involuntary bedwetting during sleep in children
symptoms.erythema: Sharply demarcated erythema of recurrent erysipelas (vasodilation with infection)
symptoms.formication: Sensation of insects crawling on skin — cocaine intoxication or withdrawal
symptoms.hirsutism: Severe hirsutism in a 17-year-old female with polycystic ovary syndrome
symptoms.hypercapnia: Arterial blood gas analysis — elevated PaCO₂ reflects hypoventilation and CO₂ retention
symptoms.hypotonia: Hypotonic infant — reduced muscle tone with floppy posture on handling
symptoms.jaundice: Scleral icterus — yellow discoloration of the conjunctiva from hyperbilirubinemia
symptoms.kernig-sign: Kernig sign — resistance to knee extension with hip flexed suggests meningeal irritation
symptoms.lacrimation: Allergic conjunctivitis with conjunctival injection and tearing
symptoms.lymphadenopathy: Cervical lymphadenopathy — enlarged palpable anterior cervical lymph nodes
symptoms.maculopapular-rash: Maculopapular eruption — coalescent erythematous macules and papules
symptoms.myoclonus: Sudden shock-like myoclonic jerk — classic in Creutzfeldt-Jakob disease and metabolic encephalopathy
symptoms.nuchal-rigidity: Nuchal rigidity — resistance to passive neck flexion in meningeal irritation
symptoms.oligomenorrhea: Estradiol, progesterone, LH, and FSH across the normal menstrual cycle — disrupted in anovulatory oligomenorrhea
symptoms.otorrhea: Battle sign — retroauricular ecchymosis associated with basilar skull fracture and possible CSF otorrhea
symptoms.papule: Violaceous flat-topped papules of lichen planus on the shins (solid, ≤1 cm)
symptoms.periorbital-pain: Cluster headache symptom diagram — unilateral periorbital pain distribution with autonomic features
symptoms.petechiae: Non-blanching petechiae on the lower limb from leukocytoclastic vasculitis
symptoms.pinpoint-pupils: Miosis (narrow pupil) vs mydriasis — pinpoint pupils are extreme miosis seen in opioid toxicity and pontine lesions
symptoms.plaque: Erythematous plaque of psoriasis with silvery scale (solid, >1 cm)
symptoms.ptosis: Myasthenia gravis — partial ptosis before and after edrophonium
symptoms.purpura: Petechiae and purpura on the lower limb from medication-induced leukocytoclastic vasculitis
symptoms.raccoon-eyes: Bilateral periorbital ecchymosis — raccoon eyes in basilar skull fracture
symptoms.rhinorrhea: Illustration of runny nose (rhinorrhea) as a respiratory symptom
symptoms.sleep-paralysis: Fuseli's The Nightmare — classic artistic depiction of sleep paralysis with hypnagogic hallucination
symptoms.telangiectasia: Spider angioma — central arteriole with radiating telangiectasias
symptoms.tonic-phase: Tonic phase of generalized seizure — sustained bilateral muscle stiffening before clonic jerking
symptoms.vesicle: Herpes labialis vesicles — fluid-filled epidermal lesions <1 cm
symptoms.virilization: Clitoromegaly in congenital adrenal hyperplasia — external manifestation of androgen excess
symptoms.xerosis: Dry, scaling skin over the knuckles consistent with xerosis
symptoms.xerostomia: Dry mouth illustration showing reduced salivary moisture
